posts.text:
The JIMMY DORE SHOW Is Live! NOW!

Joe Kent CALLS OUT Charlie Kirk Assassination Coverup!
Pentagon Needs $200 Billion More for War!

Special Guest:
Miko Peled @mikopeled

Featuring:
Kurt Metzger @KurtMetzger
Stef Zamorano @miserablelib

Now streaming on Rumble, YouTube, X & Rokfin
rumble.com/v77e4ze-joe-kent-…...

Today’s video is free to everyone while it airs live on Rumble, but it is then set to “private” after the stream ends. The full show is made available at jimmydore.com a few hours afte

03/26 - San Antonio, TX - ticketweb.com/event/jimmy-do…

03/27 - Albuquerque, NM - prekindle.com/event/77285-ji…

03/28 - Houston, TX - ticketmaster.com/event/3A006…

03/29 - Dallas, TX - ticketmaster.com/jimmy-dore-…

Jimmydore.com
Are we coming to YOUR city?

If marijuana ends the war I’ll go back to smoking it:


Invis🧜‍♀️ (@invis4yo)

I just read that US troops are smoking weed so they fail their drug tests and get kicked out, so they don't have to fight the war. Protesting is protesting🤙🏼
Brilliant.



— https://nitter.net/invis4yo/status/2034646537981280321#m

It’s obvious Israel is a psychopathic homicidal terrorist state and the last thing they want is a peace deal.

It’s time to make every politician pay a huge price for siding with Israel and taking their money:


Globe Observer (@_GlobeObserver)

🚨 Joe Kent says Ali Larijani was negotiating peace and was killed. Qatar’s gas could have stabilized energy markets — it was hit too.

He says Tel Aviv doesn’t want peace, it wants permanent war, and America is the weapon.

Video
  







— https://nitt

Why do you think they told you “DONT DO YOUR OWN RESEARCH!”? 

They even got the most subservient famous comedians to say it. 

This would be a big reason why:


TheBlaze (@theblaze)

Damning study of over a million kids finds myocarditis only in the vaccinated dlvr.it/TRb0dz





— https://nitter.net/theblaze/status/2034652197225705733#m
